title: clerodendrum pusillum
intro: Clerodendrum pusillum, also known as the Small Glory or Philippine Glory, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum pusillum include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-histamine. Herbal preparations of Clerodendrum pusillum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in folk remedies to treat a range of ailments.
